name: concurrent-cl-gate accepts the candidate envelope when no active sessions exist (sequential start path)
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"s1","phases":["E"],"branch":"feat/x"}' > cand.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/concurrent-cl-gate.sh" --sessions-dir sessions --candidate cand.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'accept reason=no_active_sessions' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
